scripts.lint: npm run lint:src && npm run lint:test
scripts.test:core: npm run test:files -- --test-isolation=none --test-concurrency 1 build-tests/test/core/*.test.js build-tests/test/core/*/*.test.js build-tests/test/core/*/*/*.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:files -- --test-isolation=none --test-concurrency 1 build-tests/test/*.test.js build-tests/test/*/*.test.js build-tests/test/*/*/*.test.js build-tests/test/*/*/*/*.test.js
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:files -- --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-lines=100 --test-coverage-branches=100 --test-coverage-functions=100 --test-isolation=none --test-concurrency 1 build-tests/test/*.test.js build-tests/test/*/*.test.js build-tests/test/*/*/*.test.js build-tests/test/*/*/*/*.test.js
